transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Maine kal UPI se payment ki thi. Amount deduct hua mera account se but receipt nahi mili.
AGENT: Aapka naam aur approximate payment amount?
CALLER: Geeta Mankar. 1,200 rupaye. Patient ID SNC-P-77001 hai.
AGENT: Ek second... haan, payment received ho gayi hai hamare system mein kal dopahar ko. Receipt process mein delay ho gayi lagta hai. Main abhi aapke registered number pe resend karta hoon.
CALLER: SMS pe aayegi ya email pe?
AGENT: Dono pe jaayegi — SMS aur email dono pe. 5 minute mein aa jaani chahiye. Kuch aur?
CALLER: Nahi, bas receipt chahiye thi. Shukriya.
